reasoning: Lactate clearance is your key limiter, indicated by the 9.3% power drop from 5-min to 20-min efforts. This workout will help improve your ability to sustain power and manage fatigue on extended climbs like the Alpine Loop. Recent rides show a steady base; we're ready to push intensity for growth.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets of 6 min at 242-256W, 2 min recovery at 201-218W in between. Aim to replicate climbs at Emigration Canyon's intensity.

weekly_focus: This week: close the 5-to-20 gap with over-unders and Zone 2 base work.
